title.en: Nope! Not a chance! 절대 안 돼! 어림도 없어!
title.ko: 아니! 절대 안 돼! 어림도 없어!

description.en: When you firmly reject an absurd request or suggestion! Practice expressing your will with 아니! 절대 안 돼! and 어림도 없어!.
description.ko: 상대방의 터무니없는 부탁이나 제안을 단호하게 거절할 때! 아니! 절대 안 돼!와 어림도 없어!를 사용해 내 의사를 확실히 표현해 봅니다.

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 저 이번 주말에 친구들이랑 여행 가기로 했거든요.
content.translation: John. I decided to go on a trip with friends this weekend.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존 차 좀 빌려줄 수 있어요?
content.translation: Can you lend me your car?

content.speaker: John
content.text: What? Mina. you don't even have a driver's license! 아니! 절대 안 돼!
content.translation: What? Mina. you don't even have a driver's license! Nope! Not a chance!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 운전은 친구가 할 거예요. 저는 옆에서 노래만 부를게요. 안 될까요?
content.translation: Haha. My friend will drive. I'll just sing next to them. Can't I?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 어림도 없어! 내 차는 나만 운전할 수 있다구요.
content.translation: No way! Only I can drive my car.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 역시 안 될 줄 알았어요. 그냥 한 번 물어본 거예요!
content.translation: Haha. I knew it wouldn't work. I just asked once!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아니! 절대 안 돼! This is very clear and direct.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 상대방의 부탁을 단호하게 거절하고 싶을 때 쓰는 가장 확실한 표현이에요.
content.translation: Right. It is the most certain expression to use when you want to firmly reject someone's request.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아니! 절대 안 돼!
content.translation: Nope! Not a chance!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 어림도 없어! 라는 말은 상대방의 제안이 말도 안 될 정도로 터무니없을 때 써요.
content.translation: And the phrase 'Eo-rim-do eop-seo!' is used when someone's suggestion is so absurd that it makes no sense.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 어림도 없어!
content.translation: No way!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Is there a phrase for "Don't even dream about it."

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그럴 땐 꿈도 꾸지 마! 라고 말해 보세요. 절대 허락하지 않겠다는 아주 강력한 거절이에요.
content.translation: Haha. In that case. say 'Kkum-do kku-ji ma!'. It's a very strong rejection meaning you will never allow it.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try another situation. Imagine I ask you to do all my work for me while I go on a vacation.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 지금 뭐라고 했어요? 제가 존 업무를 다 대신 해달라구요?
content.translation: John. what did you just say? You want me to do all your work for you?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Just for a week! I really need a break. Mina. Please!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 꿈도 꾸지 마! 제 일도 바빠서 정신이 없단 말이에요.
content.translation: Haha. Don't even dream about it! I'm so busy with my own work.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then maybe just half of my work?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 어림도 없어! 존 일은 존이 알아서 하세요!
content.translation: No way! You take care of your own work. John!

content.speaker: John
content.text: You're so cold today. Mina.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Sometimes being firm is the best way to keep your peace.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 안 되는 건 안 된다고 확실하게 말할 줄 알아야 해요.
content.translation: Right. You should know how to say no clearly when something is not possible.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 표현들로 내 의사를 분명하게 전달해 보세요!
content.translation: Try to convey your will clearly with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "no chance" reactions.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아니! 절대 안 돼! Nope! Not a chance!
content.translation: Nope! Not a chance!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 어림도 없어! No way!
content.translation: No way!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 꿈도 꾸지 마! Don't even dream about it!
content.translation: Don't even dream about it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 말도 안 돼! That's impossible!
content.translation: That's impossible!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 절대 그럴 일 없어! That will never happen!
content.translation: That will never happen!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 무리한 부탁을 받으면 당황하지 말고 확실하게 거절해 보세요!
content.translation: I hope you all reject firmly without being flustered when you receive an unreasonable request today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 저는 절대 포기하지 않을 거예요. (I will never give up.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be impossible. To be far-fetched
vocabulary.example: 그 돈으로는 집을 사기에 어림없어요. (That amount of money is far from enough to buy a house.)
친구의 부탁을 정중하게 거절했어요. (I politely rejected my friend's request.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be unreasonable. To be too much
vocabulary.example: 무리한 계획은 세우지 마세요. (Don't make unreasonable plans.)
어제 정말 무서운 꿈을 꿨어요. (I had a really scary dream last night.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be firm. To be resolute
vocabulary.example: 선생님은 단호한 태도로 말씀하셨어요. (The teacher spoke with a firm attitude.)
